title: Laboratories licensed to conduct activities with cannabis - Canada.ca
content:
## Laboratories authorized to conduct analytical testing under the Cannabis Act
The table below lists all laboratories and establishments that hold a licence for Analytical Testing under the Cannabis Regulations. These licence holders are authorized to conduct analytical testing activities with cannabis.
Be sure to contact the laboratory directly to find out what testing they offer, any requirements for product submission, cost, and amount of product needed for an accurate result.
Note that any cannabis sent to an Analytical Testing licence holder cannot be returned.
Note: Health Canada does not accredit laboratory testing procedures or methods.
Please check this website regularly for updated information.
